questions.question: What are the two primary types of files that a file system can create?
questions.hint: Files can be either regular files or directories.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a hard link and a symbolic link in a file system.
questions.hint: Compare the functionality of hard links and symbolic links.

questions.question: Describe the process of how a file system resolves a file access request to a storage device.
questions.hint: Outline the steps involved in resolving file access requests.
